name: iCatch Technology, Inc.
summary: iCatch Technology, Inc. designs and sells fabless IC. The company offers automotive grade sensing camera module image signal processor for use in ADAS front cameras, intelligent rear view cameras, blind spot detection, and driver monitoring systems; and an automotive grade SoC for use in digital video recorders, and camera and driver monitoring systems. It also provides SoC for consumer imaging devices for use in digital still, action, home security, body worn, trail, 3D sensing, surveillance, and VR cameras, as well as digital video recorders, factory automation, automated stores, and home appliances. The company was founded in 2009 and is headquartered in Hsinchu, Taiwan.
